definition:
οἰκονομία, -ας, ἡ
 (οἰκονομέω), [in LXX: Isa.22:19, 21 (מַצָּב, מֶמְשָׁלָה)* ;] 
  1. prop. (Plat., Arist.), the office of οἰκονόμος, stewardship: Luk.16:2-4. 
   2. In later writers (Plut., al.; see AR on Eph.1:10; MM, xviii), generally, administration, dispensation: 1Co.9:17, Eph.1:10 3:2, 9, Col.1:25, 1Ti.1:4.†
 (AS)
